semantic.role: Vitest end-to-end (E2E) test suite for the ArchSpine CLI commands
responsibilities: Tests CLI commands by spawning the built CLI in a temporary project directory
Verifies correct stdout, stderr, exit codes, and file creation for CLI commands
Uses `beforeAll` to initialize a temporary git repository and set up project scaffolding
Uses `afterEach` to clean up temporary directories to maintain test isolation
Validates JSON output of CLI inventory and generation commands
Ensures CLI correctly handles arguments like project initialization, validation, and file generation
outOfScope: Unit tests for internal ArchSpine modules or services
Integration tests with external dependencies like databases or containers
Performance, security, or snapshot regression testing for CLI output
Tests requiring user interaction or mock prompts
invariants: CLI must be built to `dist/cli/index.js` before tests can run
Test file must follow naming convention `.test.ts` or `.spec.ts` (architectural rule test-file-suffix)
Tests rely on `vitest` as the test runner

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a comprehensive end-to-end test suite for the ArchSpine CLI to validate command output, error handling, and file generation under realistic project conditions.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Added 37 E2E tests across 7 files covering CLI commands (initialization, inventory, generation) with temporary project isolation.

English.role: Vitest end-to-end (E2E) test suite for the ArchSpine CLI commands
responsibilities: Tests CLI commands by spawning the built CLI in a temporary project directory

Uses `afterEach` to clean up temporary directories to maintain test isolation

Simplified Chinese.role: 针对 ArchSpine CLI 命令的 Vitest 端到端（E2E）测试套件
responsibilities: 通过在临时项目目录中启动构建好的 CLI 来测试命令执行
验证 CLI 命令的标准输出、错误输出、退出码及文件创建是否正确
使用 `beforeAll` 初始化临时 Git 仓库并搭建项目脚手架
使用 `afterEach` 清理临时目录以保持测试隔离
验证 CLI 清单和生成命令的 JSON 输出
确保 CLI 正确处理项目初始化、验证和文件生成等参数
outOfScope: 内部 ArchSpine 模块或服务的单元测试
与数据库或容器等外部依赖的集成测试
CLI 输出的性能、安全或快照回归测试
需要用户交互或模拟提示的测试
